title: notifications-push — HTTP middleware
description: Middleware for the mobile-device registration surface. The transport ITSELF (push delivery to FCM / APNs) is server-to-provider outbound and does not need middleware; only the endpoints that manage device tokens do.

middleware.description: Applied to POST /api/v1/notifications/push/devices. Verifies the platform-attested signature (Apple DeviceCheck / Android SafetyNet) on the incoming device token so a hostile client cannot register arbitrary tokens against another user. Rejects with 401 on signature mismatch.
Per-user rate limit on device-token registration (10/hour, 30/day). Prevents token-registration flood attacks. Uses Laravel's RateLimiter facade.
